title: Bureau deterministic operations hardening
goal: Keep Bureau deterministic by excluding AI maintenance authority and strengthening queue, active-ball, PR-binding, closeout and status-projection guards.
completion: The Bureau AI authority boundary is documented and exposed in read-only status projection.
Queue readiness, per-repository active ball, PR task binding and closeout evidence invariants are enforced by deterministic checks.
Secretary-like visibility is supplied by deterministic status projection rather than Ollama or another model-maintained Bureau lane.

metadata.source_decision: Ollama remains outside Bureau core after local model inventory and synthetic Bureau-rule probe.
metadata.completion_summary: Bureau deterministic operations hardening completed: AI authority excluded, queue readiness and terminal queue invariants enforced, per-repo ball ambiguity visible, PR task binding hardened, typed closeout evidence required for automatic PR closeout, and deterministic secretary projection extended.
